# Copilot Instructions

<!-- Add your coding rules and guidelines below. These instructions apply to every Copilot interaction in this workspace. -->

## Coding Rules

- 
Write simple and understandable code.
Give proper name to variable.
Analyze the flow properly from where to start making change and where to end, how the files are connect to each other.

DO NOT PUSH OR COMMIT THE CODE.
Do not create any doc until mention.
Do not use single letter variable anywhere.
Do not use more than 3 useEffect in a component.
Do not run the build command unless mention.
Do not use the React.useEffect, import them properly.
Do not write inline funtion until and unless it's a one liner and not used more than once.
Do not write the code without understanding the requirement properly ask question do not assume anything.
